title: Amazing Stories Of Blues And Soul
company: the great soul sounds of the might mighty Mixers. So put on your Hi Heel Sneakers, your sharpest suit or your poshest frock and get ready to dance the night away to some of the rockingest Blues, Soul and Ska sounds around. Amazing Stories of Blues and Soul, the most fun you can have with your clothes on!
description: Kenneth B Woode - lead story teller, vocalist and harmonicaCaptain Ketch - story teller, vocalist and guitarWayne Fury - story teller and saxFabulous Franklyn - guitar and keyboardsDarth Whirlpool - drumsMr Keith - vocals, bassMarcus Blitz - trumpetRex Every'ting - trombone
